allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} → %{redirect_url}\\n" "https://www.etsy.com/signout" -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} → %{redirect_url}\\n" "https://www.etsy.com/logout" -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} → %{redirect_url}\\n" "https://www.etsy.com/sign-out" -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
